subject: Re: FSC curve issue with M
body:
No, It looks like overfitted map.. 
This is a single cytoplasmic protein.

Best,
Mingyu

2024년 7월 25일 목요일 오후 5시 33분 50초 UTC+9에 ricardo...@gmail.com님이 작성:

> Judging from the FSC curves alone this is indicative of overfitting. 
> However, the phase-randomized FSC curve (red) looks surprisingly healthy...
>
> How does the map look like? Do you think it's compatible with a resolution 
> of 4.9 Å?
>
> Also, is this by any chance a filament or lattice protein? (i.e. where 
> there are always some neighboring particles inside the box)?
>
> Best wishes,
>
> --
> Ricardo Diogo Righetto
>
>
> Em qui., 25 de jul. de 2024 às 06:42, 정민규 <jmg...@snu.ac.kr> escreveu:
>
>> + I used binary mask created from M
>>
>> 2024년 7월 25일 (목) 오전 11:51, Mingyu Jung <jmg...@snu.ac.kr>님이 작성:
>>
>>> Hi
>>>
>>> I have some issues with M. When I refined my particles with M, the FSC 
>>> curve didn't go under specific value. But in relion, there is no issue with 
>>> my FSC curve. One more weird thing is the box size from M is different from 
>>> my input half map(160 -> 204). 
>>> I posted 2 FSC curve. The normal one is from relion and weird one is 
>>> from M. My pipeline was Warp-relion4.0-M. Anyone knows the causes of issues?
>>>
>>> Best,
>>> Mingyu
>>>
